<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Mutate\Mutators\Arithmetic; use Pest\Mutate\Mutators\Abstract\AbstractMutator; use PhpParser\Node; use PhpParser\Node\Expr\BinaryOp\BitwiseAnd; use PhpParser\Node\Expr\BinaryOp\BitwiseXor; class BitwiseXorToBitwiseAnd extends AbstractMutator { public const SET = 'Arithmetic'; public const DESCRIPTION = 'Replaces `^` with `&`.'; public const DIFF = <<<'DIFF' $c = $a ^ $b; // [tl! remove] $c = $a & $b; // [tl! add] DIFF; public static function nodesToHandle(): array { return [BitwiseXor::class]; } public static function mutate(Node $node): Node { /** @var BitwiseXor $node */ return new BitwiseAnd($node->left, $node->right); } }
